patches.summary: Hand-authored GraphQL HTTP client in internal/gql/client.go replacing the generated REST client.
patches.reason: Fireflies exposes only a GraphQL API; the generator emits a REST client scaffold that cannot reach any real endpoint.
patches.validated_outcome: fireflies-pp-cli sync --full fetches all 353 transcripts across 12 channels using real GraphQL pagination.

patches.summary: Sync command never passes from_date to the API; all date filtering is client-side.
patches.reason: Fireflies API bug: the from_date parameter is silently ignored by the server. Client-side filtering on the epoch-ms date field is the only reliable approach.
patches.validated_outcome: Sync fetches all meetings and correctly filters by date on the client without triggering the broken API param.

patches.summary: Added novel commands not in the Fireflies API: transcripts find/status/export, digest, action-items, topics, speakers, summary, person timeline/complaints.
patches.reason: The Fireflies API returns rich transcript data but exposes no aggregation or search endpoints. All novel commands read from the local SQLite store populated by sync.

patches.summary: Set BaseURL default to https://api.fireflies.ai in internal/config/config.go.
patches.reason: Generator emits a placeholder base URL; Fireflies has a single well-known GraphQL endpoint.

patches.summary: Fixed mcp_binary in .printing-press.json and manifest.json to fireflies-pp-mcp.
patches.reason: Generator derived mcp_binary as fireflies-pp-cli-pp-mcp (double-suffixed); CI checks require exact match with the cmd/ directory name.
patches.validated_outcome: All 4 CI checks pass on PR #317.
